title: Spain Census Declaration for Natural Persons (Declaración Censal, Modelo 030)
description: The Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria's (AEAT, Spain's tax authority) Modelo 030, 'Declaración censal de alta en el Censo de obligados tributarios, cambio de domicilio y/o de variación de datos personales' — the simplified census declaration a natural person (persona física) not carrying out a business/professional activity uses to register in Spain's Censo de Obligados Tributarios for the first time, request a NIF when they hold no DNI/NIE, change their fiscal or notification domicile, update identifying data (name, nationality, birth data), report a change of civil status, or add/withdraw a phone number or email address AEAT may use for informational notices. A single Section 1 ('Causas de presentación') carries fifteen checkboxes — one pair (interesado/cónyuge) per cause, plus one interesado-only cause for phone/email notices — that determine which of the form's other conditional sections (2/3 identifying data, 5 fiscal domicile, 9 civil status) are completed; Sections 4 (phone/email), 6 (foreign domicile), 7 (notification domicile), and 8 (representative) are available regardless of which Section 1 cause is marked. The form is genuinely downloadable and fillable (a 4-page AcroForm PDF hosted directly on sede.agenciatributaria.gob.es, HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate; pages 3-4 are an identical duplicate 'Ejemplar para el interesado' copy of pages 1-2's 'Ejemplar para la Administración', not modeled separately). This document opens Spain as a new jurisdiction in this registry. Deliberately does not model: the electronic-filing channel (Modelo 030 can also be submitted through AEAT's authenticated Sede Electrónica, an entirely different, session-based flow this document does not attempt to describe); the external AEAT code tables the 'Clave' fields in Section 8 and the country-code field in Section 6 reference, none of which are reproduced inside this 2-page form; and the physical-signature line itself, which is not applicant-supplied data. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Spain or the Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria.

source.documentRef: Modelo 030, 'Declaración censal de alta en el Censo de obligados tributarios, cambio de domicilio y/o de variación de datos personales', Agencia Tributaria (AEAT) (4-page fillable AcroForm PDF; pages 1-2 are the 'Ejemplar para la Administración' copy, pages 3-4 an identical duplicate 'Ejemplar para el interesado')

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-1645), opening Spain as this registry's 21st jurisdiction. Screened alongside Chile's remaining Passport/National ID/Visa gaps (all re-confirmed ClaveÚnica-gated or non-resolving, no fillable form found), Peru's Migraciones/RENIEC channels (a genuine Peru PDF exists — SOLICITUD-GENERAL.pdf — but carries no AcroForm layer at all; RENIEC's own DNI-renewal app is a reCAPTCHA-enterprise-gated Angular SPA), and Argentina's RENAPER (appointment/Mi Argentina-app gated, no downloadable form found) — see VERIFICATION.md for the full candidate comparison. The live PDF was independently fetched (HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF) and its AcroForm field structure extracted via pdfjs-dist (annotation/widget layer plus page text layer, cross-referenced by x/y-coordinate and corroborated with a rendered page-image visual check via pdfjs-dist+canvas at 3x zoom), since — like the sibling cl/sii/aviso-venta-vehiculo schema's F1816 — this form's AcroForm field names are generic (dato.1...dato.135) and carry no descriptive information of their own; each field's real printed label and reference-number box were attributed by matching widget rects against the nearest label text and confirmed visually against the rendered page image. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field inventory, sourcing, and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: nifInteresado
fields.label: NIF
fields.description: NIF (Número de Identificación Fiscal) of the declarant ('interesado'). Printed as the form's own running header, present on every page; the only field this document treats as unconditionally required, since every submission — regardless of which box in Section 1 is marked — must identify who is filing.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 header 'Datos identificativos', box 01 'NIF' (AcroForm field dato.nif.1)

fields.name: apellidosInteresado
fields.label: Apellidos
fields.description: Surname(s) of the declarant, as printed in the form's own running header (combined first+second surname, distinct from Section 2's own split 'Primer apellido'/'Segundo apellido' boxes).
fields.sourceRef: p.1 header 'Datos identificativos', box 02 'Apellidos' (AcroForm field dato.1)

fields.name: nombreInteresado
fields.label: Nombre
fields.description: Given name of the declarant, as printed in the form's own running header.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 header 'Datos identificativos', box 03 'Nombre' (AcroForm field dato.2)

fields.name: causaAltaCensoInteresado
fields.label: Causa de presentación 101
fields.description: Checkbox: Alta en el censo de obligados tributarios (interesado). Section 1's own instructions state that both the 'Interesado' and 'Cónyuge' checkboxes for a shared cause are marked only when both spouses are jointly communicating the same change of fiscal/notification domicile, or simultaneously requesting registration/NIF/identifying-data changes, in which case the declaration must be signed by both spouses.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §1 'Causas de presentación', box 101 (AcroForm field dato.3)

fields.name: causaAltaCensoConyuge
fields.label: Causa de presentación 102
fields.description: Checkbox: Alta en el censo de obligados tributarios (cónyuge). Section 1's own instructions state that both the 'Interesado' and 'Cónyuge' checkboxes for a shared cause are marked only when both spouses are jointly communicating the same change of fiscal/notification domicile, or simultaneously requesting registration/NIF/identifying-data changes, in which case the declaration must be signed by both spouses.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §1 'Causas de presentación', box 102 (AcroForm field dato.4)

fields.sourceRef: p.1 §1 'Causas de presentación', box 103 (AcroForm field dato.5)

fields.label: Causa de presentación 104

Section 1's own instructions state that both the 'Interesado' and 'Cónyuge' checkboxes for a shared cause are marked only when both spouses are jointly communicating the same change of fiscal/notification domicile, or simultaneously requesting registration/NIF/identifying-data changes, in which case the declaration must be signed by both spouses.

fields.description: Checkbox: Alta/modificación/baja de datos de teléfonos y direcciones electrónicas para recibir avisos de la AEAT (interesado only — this cause has no separate cónyuge checkbox on the form). Section 1's own instructions state that both the 'Interesado' and 'Cónyuge' checkboxes for a shared cause are marked only when both spouses are jointly communicating the same change of fiscal/notification domicile, or simultaneously requesting registration/NIF/identifying-data changes, in which case the declaration must be signed by both spouses.

fields.name: residenteFiscalEspanaInteresado
fields.label: Residente fiscal en España
fields.description: Checkbox: the interesado is a fiscal resident in Spain.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2 'Datos identificativos del interesado', box 201 (AcroForm field dato.18)

fields.name: noResidenteFiscalEspanaInteresado
fields.label: NO residente fiscal en España
fields.description: Checkbox: the interesado is NOT a fiscal resident in Spain.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2 'Datos identificativos del interesado', box 202 (AcroForm field dato.19)

fields.name: fechaEfectosResidenciaFiscalInteresado
fields.label: Fecha de efectos residencia fiscal
fields.description: Effective date of the interesado's fiscal-residence status declared above. The source prints this as three adjacent day/month/year text boxes (all-numeric, maxLen 2/2/4); merged into a single date field per this registry's convention for split date sub-widgets (matching this registry's precedent, e.g. cl/sii/aviso-venta-vehiculo's fechaVenta).
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2, box 217 'Fecha de efectos residencia fiscal' (AcroForm fields dato.21/dato.22/dato.23, day/month/year)

fields.name: nifOtrosPaisesInteresado
fields.label: NIF de otros países/CIF Estado residencia
fields.description: Tax identification number issued by another country, or CIF of the interesado's state of residence, when relevant to the residency status declared above.

fields.name: numeroPasaporteInteresado
fields.label: Nº pasaporte
fields.description: Passport number of the interesado.

fields.name: nacionalidadInteresado
fields.label: Nacionalidad
fields.description: Nationality of the interesado.

fields.name: sexoInteresado
fields.label: Sexo
fields.description: Sex of the interesado. The source widget is a plain single-character text box (maxLen 1) with no combo/radio structure exposing its accepted values; 'H'/'M' (Hombre/Mujer) is this registry's inference from standard AEAT census-form convention on comparable forms, NOT confirmed from this PDF's own annotation data — flagged for a human reviewer to double-check against a live-filled specimen if one becomes available.

fields.name: nifSeccion2Interesado
fields.label: NIF
fields.description: NIF of the interesado, as entered in Section 2's own identification block (distinct AcroForm field from the running-header NIF above, though expected to carry the same value).

fields.name: primerApellidoInteresado
fields.label: Primer apellido
fields.description: First (paternal) surname of the interesado.

fields.name: segundoApellidoInteresado
fields.label: Segundo apellido
fields.description: Second (maternal) surname of the interesado, when applicable.

fields.name: nombreSeccion2Interesado
fields.label: Nombre
fields.description: Given name of the interesado, as entered in Section 2's own identification block.

fields.name: fechaNacimientoInteresado
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento
fields.description: Date of birth of the interesado. Merged from three adjacent day/month/year text boxes (all-numeric, maxLen 2/2/4) per this registry's date-merge convention.

fields.name: municipioNacimientoInteresado
fields.label: Municipio
fields.description: Municipality of birth of the interesado.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2, box 214 'Lugar de nacimiento — Municipio' (AcroForm field dato.34)

fields.name: provinciaNacimientoInteresado
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of birth of the interesado.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2, box 215 'Lugar de nacimiento — Provincia' (AcroForm field dato.35)

fields.name: paisNacimientoInteresado
fields.label: País
fields.description: Country of birth of the interesado.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §2, box 216 'Lugar de nacimiento — País' (AcroForm field dato.36)

fields.name: residenteFiscalEspanaConyuge
fields.label: Residente fiscal en España
fields.description: Checkbox: the cónyuge is a fiscal resident in Spain.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §3 'Datos identificativos del cónyuge', box 301 (AcroForm field dato.37)

fields.name: noResidenteFiscalEspanaConyuge
fields.label: NO residente fiscal en España
fields.description: Checkbox: the cónyuge is NOT a fiscal resident in Spain.

fields.name: fechaEfectosResidenciaFiscalConyuge
fields.label: Fecha de efectos residencia fiscal
fields.description: Effective date of the cónyuge's fiscal-residence status declared above. Merged from three adjacent day/month/year text boxes per this registry's date-merge convention.

fields.name: nifOtrosPaisesConyuge
fields.label: NIF de otros países/CIF Estado residencia
fields.description: Tax identification number issued by another country, or CIF of the cónyuge's state of residence.

fields.name: numeroPasaporteConyuge
fields.label: Nº pasaporte
fields.description: Passport number of the cónyuge.

fields.name: nacionalidadConyuge
fields.label: Nacionalidad
fields.description: Nationality of the cónyuge.

fields.name: sexoConyuge
fields.label: Sexo
fields.description: Sex of the cónyuge. Same unconfirmed-enum caveat as sexoInteresado: the source widget is a plain single-character text box with no exposed value list.

fields.name: nifSeccion3Conyuge
fields.label: NIF
fields.description: NIF of the cónyuge, as entered in Section 3's own identification block.

fields.name: primerApellidoConyuge
fields.label: Primer apellido
fields.description: First (paternal) surname of the cónyuge.

fields.name: segundoApellidoConyuge
fields.label: Segundo apellido
fields.description: Second (maternal) surname of the cónyuge, when applicable.

fields.name: nombreSeccion3Conyuge
fields.label: Nombre
fields.description: Given name of the cónyuge.

fields.name: fechaNacimientoConyuge
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento
fields.description: Date of birth of the cónyuge. Merged from three adjacent day/month/year text boxes per this registry's date-merge convention.

fields.name: municipioNacimientoConyuge
fields.label: Municipio
fields.description: Municipality of birth of the cónyuge.

fields.name: provinciaNacimientoConyuge
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of birth of the cónyuge.

fields.name: paisNacimientoConyuge
fields.label: País
fields.description: Country of birth of the cónyuge.

fields.name: prefijoPaisTelefono
fields.label: Prefijo país
fields.description: Country calling code prefix for the mobile number below.

fields.name: telefonoMovilAvisos
fields.label: Tlfo. móvil para avisos
fields.description: Mobile phone number the AEAT may use to send informational notices. The form's own §4 notice states that supplying a phone number or email here authorizes AEAT to use it for informational notices.

fields.name: bajaTelefonoAvisos
fields.label: Baja
fields.description: Checkbox: withdraw ('baja') a previously registered notice mobile number, rather than adding/changing one. Left required:false/independent of telefonoMovilAvisos: a withdrawal submission would set this true while leaving the number field blank.

fields.name: correoElectronicoAvisos
fields.label: Correo electrónico para avisos
fields.description: Email address the AEAT may use to send informational notices.

fields.name: bajaCorreoElectronicoAvisos
fields.label: Baja
fields.description: Checkbox: withdraw ('baja') a previously registered notice email address, rather than adding/changing one.

fields.name: tipoViaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Tipo de vía
fields.description: Street-type abbreviation (e.g. Calle, Avenida, Plaza) of the interesado's Spanish fiscal domicile.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §5 'Consignación de domicilio fiscal', box 411 (AcroForm field dato.60)

fields.name: nombreViaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Nombre de la vía pública
fields.description: Street name of the fiscal domicile.

fields.name: tipoNumeracionDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Tipo Num.
fields.description: House-numbering type qualifier of the fiscal domicile (e.g. Número, Kilómetro).

fields.name: numeroCasaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Núm. casa
fields.description: House/building number of the fiscal domicile.

fields.name: calificadorNumeroDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Calif. nu[m]
fields.description: Qualifier appended to the house number (e.g. bis, duplicado), when applicable.

fields.name: bloqueDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Bloque
fields.description: Block identifier of the fiscal domicile, when applicable.

fields.name: portalDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Portal
fields.description: Portal/entrance identifier of the fiscal domicile, when applicable.

fields.name: escaleraDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Escal.
fields.description: Staircase identifier of the fiscal domicile, when applicable.

fields.name: plantaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Planta
fields.description: Floor of the fiscal domicile, when applicable.

fields.name: puertaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Puerta
fields.description: Door identifier of the fiscal domicile, when applicable.

fields.name: complementoDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Complemento domicilio
fields.description: Free-text complement to the fiscal domicile (e.g. Urbanización, Polígono Industrial, Centro Comercial), per the source's own examples.

fields.name: localidadDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Localidad / Población
fields.description: Locality/population center of the fiscal domicile, only when distinct from the municipality below.

fields.name: codigoPostalDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: C. Postal
fields.description: Postal code of the fiscal domicile. The source widget itself carries a generic maxLen of 10 with no format constraint; this document tightens it to Spain's standard 5-digit postal-code format as a disclosed judgment call, since §5 is explicitly scoped to a 'Domicilio fiscal en España'.

fields.name: municipioDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Nombre del Municipio
fields.description: Municipality of the fiscal domicile.

fields.name: provinciaDomicilioFiscal
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the fiscal domicile.

fields.name: indicadorReferenciaCatastral
fields.label: Indicador Ref. catastral
fields.description: Short indicator/prefix code for the cadastral reference below, per Spain's cadastral-reference numbering convention.

fields.name: referenciaCatastral
fields.label: Referencia catastral
fields.description: Cadastral reference number of the fiscal domicile, when known.

fields.name: domicilioFiscalExtranjero
fields.label: Domicilio fiscal
fields.description: Checkbox: the foreign address entered below is the interesado's fiscal domicile abroad.
fields.sourceRef: p.1 §6 'Consignación de domicilio en el extranjero', box 501 (AcroForm field dato.78)

fields.name: otrosDomiciliosExtranjero
fields.label: Otros domicilios
fields.description: Checkbox: the foreign address entered below is some other (non-fiscal) foreign address.

fields.name: direccionExtranjero
fields.label: Domicilio (Address)
fields.description: Full street address of the foreign domicile (the source's own bilingual label 'Domicilio (Address)' is printed verbatim).

fields.name: complementoDomicilioExtranjero
fields.label: Complemento domicilio
fields.description: Free-text complement to the foreign address, when needed.

fields.name: poblacionCiudadExtranjero
fields.label: Población / Ciudad
fields.description: City/town of the foreign address.

fields.name: codigoPostalExtranjero
fields.label: C. Postal (ZIP)
fields.description: Postal/ZIP code of the foreign address, in that country's own format (left unconstrained, unlike the Spain-only domestic postal-code fields elsewhere in this document).

fields.name: provinciaRegionEstadoExtranjero
fields.label: Provincia / Región / Estado
fields.description: Province/region/state of the foreign address.

fields.name: paisExtranjero
fields.label: País
fields.description: Country name of the foreign address.

fields.name: codigoPaisExtranjero
fields.label: Cod. País
fields.description: Country code of the foreign address, per AEAT's own external country-code table (not reproduced in this form).

fields.name: bajaDomicilioNotificaciones
fields.label: Baja
fields.description: Checkbox: withdraw ('baja') a previously registered notification domicile, rather than adding/changing one.
fields.sourceRef: p.2 §7 'Consignación del domicilio a efectos de notificaciones', box 600 (AcroForm field dato.90)

fields.name: tipoViaNotificaciones
fields.label: Tipo de vía
fields.description: Street-type abbreviation of the notification domicile — track 1) of two alternative tracks the source's own instructions offer ('cumplimente el apartado 1 ó el 2 según estime oportuno'); track 2) is the apartado-de-correos fields below. Left required:false/ungated: the source names no field that flags which of the two tracks applies, only the general causaDomicilioNotificacionesInteresado/Conyuge checkboxes in Section 1, which do not distinguish between them either.

fields.name: nombreViaNotificaciones
fields.label: Nombre de la vía pública
fields.description: Street name of the notification domicile (track 1).

fields.name: tipoNumeracionNotificaciones
fields.label: Tipo Num.
fields.description: House-numbering type qualifier of the notification domicile (track 1).

fields.name: numeroCasaNotificaciones
fields.label: Núm. casa
fields.description: House/building number of the notification domicile (track 1).

fields.name: calificadorNumeroNotificaciones
fields.label: Calif. nu[m]
fields.description: Qualifier appended to the house number of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: bloqueNotificaciones
fields.label: Bloque
fields.description: Block identifier of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: portalNotificaciones
fields.label: Portal
fields.description: Portal/entrance identifier of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: escaleraNotificaciones
fields.label: Escal.
fields.description: Staircase identifier of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: plantaNotificaciones
fields.label: Planta
fields.description: Floor of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: puertaNotificaciones
fields.label: Puerta
fields.description: Door identifier of the notification domicile, when applicable (track 1).

fields.name: complementoDomicilioNotificaciones
fields.label: Complemento domicilio
fields.description: Free-text complement to the notification domicile (track 1), same examples as the fiscal-domicile complement above.

fields.name: localidadNotificaciones
fields.label: Localidad / Población
fields.description: Locality/population center of the notification domicile, only when distinct from the municipality below (track 1).

fields.name: codigoPostalNotificaciones
fields.label: C. Postal
fields.description: Postal code of the notification domicile (track 1). Not pattern-constrained to 5 digits, unlike the fiscal-domicile postal code: unlike Section 5, Section 7 does not print an 'en España'-only scope note, so a stricter domestic-only pattern was not asserted here.

fields.name: municipioNotificaciones
fields.label: Nombre del Municipio
fields.description: Municipality of the notification domicile (track 1).

fields.name: provinciaNotificaciones
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the notification domicile (track 1).

fields.name: destinatarioNotificaciones
fields.label: Destinatario (si es distinto del declarante)
fields.description: Name of the notification recipient, only when different from the declarant (track 1).

fields.name: calidadDestinatarioNotificaciones
fields.label: En calidad de
fields.description: Capacity in which the named recipient acts (e.g. representante, apoderado, familiar), per the source's own examples (track 1).

fields.name: apartadoCorreosNumero
fields.label: APARTADO DE CORREOS NÚMERO
fields.description: P.O. box number of the notification domicile — track 2) of the two alternative tracks (see tipoViaNotificaciones above).

fields.name: poblacionCiudadApartadoCorreos
fields.label: Población / Ciudad
fields.description: City/town of the P.O. box (track 2).

fields.name: codigoPostalApartadoCorreos
fields.label: C. Postal
fields.description: Postal code of the P.O. box (track 2). Tightened to Spain's 5-digit format as a disclosed judgment call, consistent with codigoPostalDomicilioFiscal, since a P.O. box is necessarily a domestic Spanish postal facility.

fields.name: provinciaApartadoCorreos
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the P.O. box (track 2).

fields.name: destinatarioApartadoCorreos
fields.label: Destinatario (si es distinto del declarante)
fields.description: Name of the notification recipient at the P.O. box, only when different from the declarant (track 2).

fields.name: calidadDestinatarioApartadoCorreos
fields.label: En calidad de
fields.description: Capacity in which the named P.O.-box recipient acts (track 2).

fields.name: nifRepresentante
fields.label: NIF
fields.description: NIF of the legal or voluntary representative acting on the interesado's behalf, when the declaration is filed through a representative.

fields.name: nombreRazonSocialRepresentante
fields.label: Apellidos y nombre o razón social
fields.description: Full name (or company name, if the representative is a legal entity) of the representative.

fields.name: representanteResidenteSi
fields.label: Residente: SÍ
fields.description: Checkbox: the representative is a fiscal resident.

fields.name: representanteResidenteNo
fields.label: Residente: NO
fields.description: Checkbox: the representative is not a fiscal resident.

fields.name: representacionLegal
fields.label: Legal
fields.description: Checkbox: the representative acts under legal representation (e.g. parental authority, guardianship).
fields.sourceRef: p.2 §8 'Causa de la representación', box 704 (AcroForm field dato.117)

fields.name: representacionLegalClave
fields.label: Clave (Legal)
fields.description: Code identifying the specific legal-representation basis, per AEAT's own external code table (not reproduced in this 2-page form).

fields.name: representacionVoluntaria
fields.label: Voluntaria
fields.description: Checkbox: the representative acts under voluntary representation (e.g. power of attorney).

fields.name: tipoRepresentacionClave
fields.label: Tipo de representación — Clave
fields.description: Code identifying the type of representation, per AEAT's own external code table (not reproduced in this form).

fields.name: tituloRepresentacionClave
fields.label: Título de la representación — Clave
fields.description: Code identifying the document/title evidencing the representation, per AEAT's own external code table (not reproduced in this form).

fields.name: estadoCivilSoltero
fields.label: Soltero/a
fields.description: Checkbox: current civil status is single.

fields.name: estadoCivilCasado
fields.label: Casado/a
fields.description: Checkbox: current civil status is married.

fields.name: estadoCivilViudo
fields.label: Viudo/a
fields.description: Checkbox: current civil status is widowed.

fields.name: estadoCivilDivorciadoSeparado
fields.label: Divorciado/a o separado/a legalmente
fields.description: Checkbox: current civil status is divorced or legally separated.

fields.name: fechaAdquisicionEstadoCivilActual
fields.label: Fecha de adquisición del estado civil actual
fields.description: Date the current civil status (checked above) was acquired. The source itself parenthetically scopes this box to '(si se comunica cambio de estado civil)' — only when a civil-status change is being communicated — matched here to the causaCambioEstadoCivilInteresado checkbox in Section 1.
fields.sourceRef: p.2 §9, box 805 (AcroForm field dato.126, single free-text box, maxLen 10 — not split into day/month/year sub-widgets like the other date fields in this document)

fields.name: lugarFirma
fields.label: En [lugar]
fields.description: Place of signature ('En ___ a ___ de ___ de ___').
fields.sourceRef: p.2 §10 'Fecha y firma de la declaración' (AcroForm field dato.127)

fields.name: fechaFirma
fields.label: Fecha de la declaración
fields.description: Date of signature. Merged from three adjacent 'a ___ de ___ de ___' (day/month/year) text boxes per this registry's date-merge convention. Judgment call: the day (dato.128) and year (dato.130) sub-boxes carry native maxLen 2/4 (purely numeric), but the month sub-box (dato.129) carries no maxLen at all — unlike every other merged date triple in this document — suggesting the source may expect the month spelled out as a word (e.g. 'julio') rather than a 2-digit number on this specific line; normalized to a single ISO date here regardless, consistent with how this document treats every other split date widget.
